export const getAQICategory = aqi => {
  if (aqi <= 50) return {
    label: "Good",
    color: "#00e400",
    risk: "Minimal"
  };
  if (aqi <= 100) return {
    label: "Satisfactory",
    color: "#92d050",
    risk: "Low"
  };
  if (aqi <= 200) return {
    label: "Moderate",
    color: "#ffff00",
    risk: "Moderate"
  };
  if (aqi <= 300) return {
    label: "Poor",
    color: "#ff7e00",
    risk: "High"
  };
  if (aqi <= 400) return {
    label: "Very Poor",
    color: "#ff0000",
    risk: "Severe"
  };
  return {
    label: "Severe",
    color: "#99004c",
    risk: "Hazardous"
  };
};
export const predictHealthRisk = (aqi, age, smoker, existingCondition) => {
  let baseRisk = 0;
  if (aqi > 50) baseRisk += (aqi - 50) * 0.15;
  if (age > 60) baseRisk *= 1.8;else if (age > 40) baseRisk *= 1.3;else if (age < 12) baseRisk *= 1.5;
  if (smoker) baseRisk *= 1.6;
  if (existingCondition) baseRisk *= 1.9;
  return Math.min(Math.round(baseRisk), 100);
};
